name: tribex_ai

renderer_definitions.name: tribex_ai_home
renderer_definitions.description: First-party AI home surface for workspace status, recent projects, recent threads, and recovery actions.

renderer_definitions.name: tribex_ai_setup
renderer_definitions.description: First-party in-app setup flow for organization readiness, billing, provisioning, and local tool handoff.

renderer_definitions.name: tribex_ai_thread
renderer_definitions.description: Chat-first hosted thread surface with transcript, composer, tool activity, and reconnect context.

renderer_definitions.name: tribex_ai_tool_catalog
renderer_definitions.description: Workspace-scoped tool catalog with per-device readiness and relay approval state.

registry_index.summary: Bundled first-party AI shell surfaces for MCPViews.

plugin_rules: The bundled TribeX AI surfaces are first-party shell companions for workspace setup, discovery, thread work, and tool readiness.
